introSection: Penguin Coaster (Chinese: 企鹅过山车) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Chimelong Ocean Kingdom in Xiangzhou, Zhuhai, Guangdong, China. It is situated in the Hero Island themed area.
fullText: Penguin Coaster (Chinese: 企鹅过山车) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Chimelong Ocean Kingdom in Xiangzhou, Zhuhai, Guangdong, China. It is situated in the Hero Island themed area.
